Who We Are

About Sri Anjaneya
Enterprises

Our business has been successfully running for over 8+ years, proudly serving products across worldwide markets. We feel proud to serve customers globally and are committed to expanding with numerous clients in diverse sectors.

We serve corporates, retail outlets, industries, agriculture, pharmaceuticals, real estate and many more sectors that depend on reliable water solutions every single day.

We are here to offer the best product suitable for your requirement and make you happy with comfortable, competitive prices.

We deal with a wide variety of submersible water motors from multiple popular brands — KSB, Kirloskar, Wilo, Crompton, Falcon, Lubi, CRI, Ekki-Deccan — and our own developed brand Aqua Tide, serving household and agriculture purposes at reasonable marketplace prices.

Our Leadership

Meet Our Leaders

Gonugunta Venkata Sailaja
Chief Executive Officer (CEO)
  • Established with a root cause to ensure customer satisfaction and develop & distribute products worldwide.
  • Spearheads strategic business planning and global market expansion initiatives to drive continuous growth.
  • Focuses on building strong, long-term relationships with international clients and partners.
  • Ensures the highest standards of product quality and service delivery across all corporate and retail channels.
  • Leads a culture of innovation, driving the successful launch of the Aqua Tide proprietary brand.
  • Passionate about operational excellence and sustainable business practices in the water solutions industry.
  • Orchestrates multi-channel distribution networks to ensure seamless global supply chain operations.
  • Champions a customer-first approach, actively soliciting feedback to refine and enhance product offerings.
  • Drives corporate social responsibility (CSR) initiatives, focusing on community development and water conservation.
Gonugunta Venkata Sathyanarayana
Managing Director
  • Having complete start-to-tail knowledge on motors for domestic and agriculture product ranges.
  • Worked as a sales engineer for 22 years, holding great domain knowledge in submersible motor and pump industries.
  • Provided solution-driven insights on all real-time problems based on client requirements, with proactive measures for technical issues.
  • Ensuring security, maintaining, and monitoring client leads data.
  • Gathering leads and providing quotations with the best deals compared to the marketplace.
  • Ensuring safe delivery for clients with proper packaging and heavy safeguard measures.
  • Mentors and develops high-performing sales teams to exceed revenue targets and market penetration goals.
  • Spearheads rigorous quality control protocols during product distribution to guarantee zero-defect deliveries.
  • Cultivates key vendor relationships to negotiate favorable terms and optimize procurement costs.
Our Products

Brands We Trust & Supply

We partner with globally recognized submersible motor brands and also manufacture our own — all chosen for reliability, efficiency, and value for household and agricultural use.

KSB
Germany — Est. 1871 · 150+ Years
✓ Authorized Dealer

World-renowned German pump manufacturer with precision-engineered submersible motors delivering outstanding head pressure and flow rates for Indian farms and municipalities.

Deep BorewellIrrigationVillage SupplyDomestic
Kirloskar
India — Est. 1888 · Enriching Lives
✓ Authorized Dealer

India's most trusted pump brand with 135+ years of excellence. Rugged, energy-efficient submersible motors certified for SPB range from Dewas, Sanand and Kaniyur plants.

Agricultural WellsOpen WellsOverhead TanksIrrigation
Wilo
Germany — Est. 1872 · 60+ Countries
✓ Authorized Dealer

Global leader in smart premium pumping technology. Intelligent, energy-efficient submersible motors reducing electricity costs while maintaining consistent water pressure.

ResidentialPressure BoostingDrip & SprinklerBorewell
Ekki-Deccan
India — Coimbatore, Est. 1981
✓ Certified ADBS Dealer (Secunderabad)

South India's largest submersible pump manufacturers. Certified Agriculture & Domestic Building Services dealer for EKKI & DECCAN brands in Secunderabad. Ideal for deep borewells and high-head agricultural pumping.

High-Head PumpingDeep BorewellSprinklerOpenwell
C.R.I. Pumps
India — Coimbatore, Est. 1960
✓ Dealer

Commitment, Reliability, Innovation — 5+ decades of pump excellence. Trusted borewell submersibles and openwell pumps for agricultural irrigation, solar pumping, and domestic supply.

Borewell SubmersibleOpenwellSolar PumpingDomestic
Falcon
India — A Machine For Mankind
✓ Dealer

Reputed Indian submersible pump brand known for robust construction and reliable performance. Popular among farmers for high efficiency in hard rock borewells with long operational life.

Borewell PumpingAgricultureOpenwellDomestic
Lubi
India — Pumps & Motors
✓ Dealer

Trusted Indian pump and motor brand with compact designs and energy efficiency. Popular for both household water supply and agricultural irrigation across rural and urban India.

HouseholdBorewellOpenwellFarm Irrigation
Crompton
India — Est. 1878 · 140+ Years
✓ Dealer

One of India's most recognized electrical and pump brands with 140+ years of legacy. Celebrated for energy efficiency, reliability, and wide service center availability for homes and farms.

DomesticAgricultural WellsBorewellWater Supply
Aqua Tide
Sri Anjaneya Enterprises — Manufactured Brand
✓ Registered Own Brand

Aqua Tide is our self-developed submersible motor brand — engineered for durability, energy efficiency, and consistent performance in Indian water conditions. Affordable, reliable, and built for both household and agricultural needs at the most competitive prices.

Trust & Credibility

Our Certifications

We are proud authorized dealers for multiple renowned brands. Here are our official certificates of dealership and authorisation.

Kirloskar — Certificate of Authorisation
Official dealership for selling original Kirloskar Pumps of SPB range manufactured at Dewas, Sanand and Kaniyur plants.
✓ Valid Till: 30.06.2027
EKKI Water Technologies — Certificate of Dealership
Authorised Agriculture & Domestic Building Services (ADBS) dealer for EKKI Brand Product Lines in Secunderabad.
✓ Valid: 2023 – 2025
D-Plus Pumptech / DECCAN — Certificate of Dealership
Authorised Agriculture & Domestic Building Services (ADBS) dealer for DECCAN Brand Product Lines in Secunderabad.
✓ Valid: 2023 – 2025

IndiaMART — TrustSeal Certificate
Official IndiaMART TrustSeal verified and trusted seller certificate.

IndiaMART (IndiaMART InterMESH Ltd.) is India's largest online Business-to-Business (B2B) marketplace.

Trust & Verification: IndiaMART places a high emphasis on seller credibility. The "TrustSeal" certificate is a premium verification badge they offer. It indicates that IndiaMART has verified the seller's business details, reliability, and legal existence, establishing a layer of trust for buyers purchasing through the platform.
